ops.title: ccx vcs ship runs prek hooks before committing
ops.description: shipRunHooks via `uvx prek run --cd <root> --files …` with auto-fix-then-verify (rerun once; clean → commit fixes folded in; still red → abort pre-commit/push), --no-verify flag, soft-skip segments (uvx-missing, jj-without-.git), vcs.DetectRoot helper, fake-uvx test coverage. Adapt to post-v0.21.0 ship.go (auto-rebase landed since planning).

ops.text: task test && task lint green in ~/Code/cc-context incl. new hook-step tests
live jj canary: ship on a whitespace-dirty new file shows 'hooks fixed' and commits clean; persistent failure aborts before commit; --no-verify skips
